title: CCB-Spearforged Legguards
description: Combine spears and leggings into a single weaponized armor piece.
body:
Spearforged Legguards is a sleek datapack that lets you bind the power of the spear directly into your armor.

Use a smithing table to combine any spear with leggings, and the leggings will gain the custom "Close-Combat Bind" (CCB) enchantment. The CCB level depends on the spear’s material (wood = I, netherite = VII, etc.).

While wearing CCB-enchanted leggings, press and release ⇧ Shift (crouch then stand) to unleash a spectral spear thrust from your legs. This summoned spear:

Deals +0.5 damage per CCB level
Extends its reach by +0.7 blocks per CCB level
Perfect for warriors who strike from unexpected angles, this pack turns your legs into a hidden weapon—blending stealth, timing, and precision in true polearm fashion.

《矛锻护腿》 是一个精巧的数据包，让你将长矛之力直接注入护甲。

在锻造台上将任意长矛与护腿合成，护腿将获得自定义附魔 “近战绑定”（CCB），等级由长矛材质决定（木矛 = I 级，下界合金矛 = VII 级等）。

穿戴带 CCB 的护腿时，按下并松开 ⇧ 蹲下键（即蹲下再站起），即可从腿部释放一道灵能长矛进行突刺。该召唤长矛：

每级 CCB +0.5 伤害
每级 CCB +0.7 格攻击距离
专为擅长出其不意的战士设计，让你的双腿化作隐藏武器——以时机、精准与突袭诠释长柄武器的精髓。
